summary: TWO_COLUMN: Axes with 4 faint basis curves (1, x, x², x³) and always_redraw YELLOW polynomial p(x) = a₀ + a₁x + a₂x² + a₃x³. RIGHT has 4 ValueTracker-driven coefficient bars a₀..a₃ (BLUE/GREEN/RED/PURPLE) + live expression. 6 config tour: constant → linear → quadratic → cubic → mixture → parabola.
